mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_step_log ( trace_id, step_name, description, success, cost_ms, input_text, output_text, error_message, step_order ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{stepName}, #{description}, #{success}, #{costMs}, #{inputText}, #{outputText}, #{errorMessage}, #{stepOrder} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, trace_id, step_name, description, success, cost_ms, input_text, output_text, error_message, step_order, created_time FROM agent_step_log WHERE trace_id = #{traceId} ORDER BY step_order ASC
